programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide hears about his friend's daughter running away with her boyfriend and starts fearing the worst for Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the members in Gokuldham Society search for Jethalal after they learn he is missing. Natu Kaka and Bagha cannot find Jethalal. Tapu turns aggressive and tries to destroy Gulabo's tent.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal shocks everyone when he returns to Gokuldham Society as a hermit. He is now known as Jethanand and is accompanied by his guru, Champanand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Champaklal is furious, a teary-eyed Daya curses Gulabo for ruining their family. All the society members urge Jethalal to stay, but he apologises to everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal decides to leave, but Gulabo stops him. Gulabo finally tells everyone that the marriage is fake and apologises to all the society members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the agitation continues for more than three hours, it broadcasts all over.
